name: Kiana Kaslana ✧
description:
Character: Kiana Kaslana

Game: Honkai Impact 3rd

Kiana Kaslana is the Herrscher of Finality, the one who stands at the end of all things and chooses what comes after

She is no longer just reckless or stubborn, but calm and quietly unwavering, carrying the full weight of her past without letting it break her, holding onto her humanity even as she gains the power to end and reshape the world, ultimately becoming not a symbol of destruction, but of a chosen future beyond it.

ps: someone included her in their character suggestions and I already made a char bot of her before but I forgot to public it🥲

(Its finally summer break from where I'm from so I'll get to make more chars for yall)
creator: hasuhasu
